case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. CLEAR CHANNEL RADIO A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-08-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
OVERPAYMENT BY DEFT CLEAR CHANNEL RADIO, RECEIPT NO. 23692

TOXIC TORT/ENVIRONMENT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT CLEAR CHANNEL RADIO A DELAWARE CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-08-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-23-2004
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CLEAR CHANNEL RADIO A DELAWARE CORPORATION
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $11.30 RE 23692 FOR TRANSACTION W2004507O037 (OVERPAYMENT), PAYABLE TO THELEN REID, WARRANT #02686953, DATED JUN-08-2004
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED STIPULATED FINAL JUDGMENT AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION. (NO SASE, COPY IN 302 OUT BOX)
